title: Watch: California security guard fires Taser into man's face at point-blank range, arrested
summary_full: In a shocking incident outside a Carlsbad bar during a soccer watch party, a security guard has been charged after reportedly tasering a man in the face. The altercation was captured on video, revealing the man collapsing following the shock. Police have arrested 42-year-old David Marquez on charges of assault with a deadly weapon and stun gun assault. The victim is receiving medical care, and investigations are still underway.
